role: Cleric; member of the Assembly of Experts for the Constitution; brother of Ali Khamenei
bio: Mohammad Khamenei is a Shia cleric and the brother of Supreme Leader [Ali Khamenei](/people/ali-khamenei). He was elected to the [Assembly of Experts for the Constitution](/orgs/assembly-of-experts-for-constitution) in 1979, representing Khorasan Province with over 60% of the vote. He was among the 53 assembly members who voted in favor of the velayat-e faqih provisions that granted sweeping powers to the Supreme Leader. He has maintained a relatively low political profile compared to his brother.
editorial_notes: Born 1935 in Mashhad. Brother of Ali Khamenei. Elected from Khorasan Province in 1979 with 640,958 votes (60.3%).
